Cruise Tickets

Choose your afternoon.

Seven scheduled cruises running year-round from Marina Mirage — from whale season mornings to New Year’s Eve across three decks.

Our Yachts

Two superyachts. One unhurried coastline.

Sun Goddess for head-turning arrivals. Mermaid Spirit for three decks of celebration. Both berthed at Marina Mirage, ready for your afternoon.

01
34m · 110ft Superyacht
Sun Goddess

Sleek, stylish, unmistakable on the Broadwater. Dual bars, two decks, a dual-level galley, and sound throughout — room to breathe without giving up a thing.

Guests
135
Length
34m
Decks
Two
Step aboard
02
30m · 100ft Tri-Deck
Mermaid Spirit

A tri-deck catamaran built for functions and celebrations. Three decks, a chef's kitchen, sun lounge, dual bars — the ultimate entertaining venue on the coast.

Guests
100
Length
30m
Decks
Three
Step aboard
Yacht Charters

Tailored for every occasion.

From intimate sunset proposals to full-vessel corporate events — every charter is bespoke, every afternoon written to your brief.

01
Private
Your afternoon

Up to 135 guests. Half-day or full-day on the Broadwater. BBQ, watersports, a swim stop at Wavebreak.

Enquire
02
Corporate
Your function

Client events, team offsites, product launches. Dual bars, sound throughout, curated catering.

Enquire
03
Weddings
Your ceremony

Ceremony on the foredeck, reception across three decks. Florals, celebrant, and the line the captain reads.

Enquire
04
Galley
Your menu

Grazing boards, canapés, gourmet BBQ, fine dining. Curated with Private Chefs of Brisbane.

Enquire

On the water
“Hands down the best whale watching in south east Queensland. Informative without overwhelming — we watched them breach several times. Unforgettable.”
G
Gleyn Hernandez
Google · Whale Watching
“An amazing experience visiting from England. Never imagined I’d see so many whales and a pod of dolphins. The crew made us feel genuinely welcome.”

Google · Whale Watching

Ready when you are

Ready to
set sail?

Every charter begins with a conversation. Share the afternoon you have in mind — our concierge replies within the hour.

Booking EnquiryBrowse Cruise Tickets
Destinations

Where we anchor.

We run the calm, protected waters of the Gold Coast Broadwater — and when conditions invite, we push north into Moreton Bay. Your skipper reads the day and writes the line.

Plan a Route
i.Gold Coast
01Wave Break Island
02Sanctuary Cove
03Jumpinpin
04Scottish Prince Wreck
05Sovereign Islands
ii.Moreton Bay
01Brisbane River
02Tangalooma
03Moreton Island
04Stradbroke Island
Frequently Asked

Before you board.

Everything you need to know before a charter — parking, catering, destinations, mobility. Anything else, our concierge is at the other end of a phone.

Contact Concierge
Where do your boats depart from?

Our boats are berthed at Muriel Henchman Public Pontoon on the Gold Coast — about ten minutes from Surfers Paradise and fifteen from Broadbeach. Look for our signage next to the Heli Tours at Marina Mirage.

Do you offer pre-made charter packages?

Three starting points: Beaches and BBQs — a midday run to the islands, watersports, and buffet. Sunset cocktails and canapés — five o'clock out of Marina Mirage into golden hour. Or a fully custom charter — tell us the occasion and we write the afternoon.

What about food and drinks?

Each vessel has two bars with bar-tab or consumption options. Our culinary partners — Private Chefs of Brisbane — handle everything from grazing boards and canapés to gourmet BBQ, buffet, and fine dining.

What destinations can we visit?

Most charters run the calm Broadwater — Wave Break Island, Sanctuary Cove, Jumpinpin, the Scottish Prince wreck, the mansions at Sovereign Islands. When conditions invite, we push north into Moreton Bay for Tangalooma, Moreton Island and Stradbroke.

Will I get seasick?

We operate in the protected waters of the Gold Coast Broadwater, where swell is minimal. If we head offshore into open ocean there is a possibility of larger waves — your skipper reads the day and the route accordingly.

Are your charters accessible for guests with limited mobility?

We have welcomed many guests with limited mobility. Boarding requires a step up from the marina pontoon, and each guest is different — our team will walk you through the layout and accommodations before booking to make sure it is the right fit.

Booking Enquiry

Tell us the occasion.

Every charter begins with a conversation. Share the afternoon you have in mind — the date, the guests, the reason — and our concierge replies within the hour.

DockMuriel Henchman Pontoon, Marina Mirage
Hours08:00 — 20:00 daily
